column1: Does your employer provide mental health benefits as part of healthcare coverage?_num,Do you know the options for mental health care available under your employer-provided coverage?_num,"Has your employer ever formally discussed mental health (for example, as part of a wellness campaign or other official communication)?_num",Would you feel comfortable discussing a mental health disorder with your direct supervisor(s)?_num,Would you feel comfortable discussing a mental health disorder with your coworkers?_num,Do you think that discussing a mental health disorder with your employer would have negative consequences?_num,Do you feel that your employer takes mental health as seriously as physical health?_num,Have you heard of or observed negative consequences for co-workers who have been open about mental health issues in your workplace?_num,Do you currently have a mental health disorder?_num,Have you ever sought treatment for a mental health issue from a mental health professional?_num,Do you feel that being identified as a person with a mental health issue would hurt your career?_num,How willing would you be to share with friends and family that you have a mental illness?_num
